calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Preliminary Distribution,For Interpretation Of Will, And For Distribution To Testamentary Trust.
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diane Cash for and with Brett Waxdeck. Bryan Hodes (Brother of Howard) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Cash stated that Howard has capacity. Mr. Hodes stated that Howard had an understanding of what the trust is and what the terms mean, and that Howard has the capacity to understand that it is in his best interest. Ms. Cash provided a copy of the consent form. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution,For Interpretation Of Will, And For Distribution To Testamentary Trust.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Continued To Feb-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diane Cash for Executor. Paul Melbostad for Executor in the litigation matter. Bryan Hodes (Brother of Howard Hodes) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Cash stated that there were no objections to Mr. Melbostad's fees. The Court questioned the terms of the trust not being set forth in the petition. Ms. Cash stated that the supplement filed on December 15, 2010 titled Agreement Regarding Irrevocable Trust had a copy of the trust agreement attached and provided an endorsed copy for the Court's review. Mr. Hodes stated that he had spoken with Howard a couple of times, that they had lucid conversations but not accurate, and that Howard reviewed the amendments to the trust but that Howard would not commit to signing it or coming to Court. The matter was taken under submission to allow the Court to review the agreement/trust terms.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution,For Interpretation Of Will, And For Distribution To Testamentary Trust.
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Continued To Jan-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution,For Interpretation Of Will, And For Distribution To Testamentary Trust.
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Continued To Jan-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Establish Estate'S Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Transfer To Estate
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Establish Estate'S Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Transfer To Estate
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Continued To Oct-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Brett Waxdeck (Executor). Robert Peterson for Melvin Hodes (Objector).

Counsel stated that discovery had been conducted and that the matter was ready to be set for a one day trial. Trial on the Petition To Establish Estate's Claim Of Ownership To Property was set for October 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition To Establish Estate'S Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Transfer To Estate
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Continued To Sep-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authority To Pay Litigation Counsel'S Fees And Costs Prior To Completion Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diane Cash for and with Brett Waxdeck (Executor). Robert Peterson for Melvin Hodes (Objector).

The Court stated that it now had the underlying fee agreement. Mr. Peterson argued that the personal representative cannot delegate his/her duties, stated that there were no other objections to the fees, and requested the Court renew jurisdiction over the allocation of the fees. Ms. Cash argued that it was a standard fee agreement and that they brought both petitions to protect against the Estate. The matter was taken under submission, and the Claim of ownership currently set for June 17, 2009, was continued to September 9, 2009. The Court stated that it will reserve how the Objector's share will be allocated. Ms. Cash inquired as to when there would be an allocation. The Court stated at the time of distribution.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy S. McDaniels.

Petition For Authority To Pay Litigation Counsel'S Fees And Costs Prior To Completion Of Administration
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Continued To Jun-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diane Cash, Esq. for and with Executor Brett Waxdeck; Robert Peterson, Esq. for Beneficiary and Objector Melvin Hodes.

Ms. Cash stated that she had talk with an Estate litigator regarding the retainer fee agreement, with the cap for fees and costs at about $10,000.00. Mr. Peterson objected, stated that his client is in poor health and to move this as soon as possible, litigation may take a long time, the Petition for litigation counsel's fees and costs is without merit, and such disposition of funds should come from other beneficiaries' shares.
The Court continued the matter to June 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to review the retainer agreement.

Comm. Sue Kaplan, CSR: LaVena Ward #7077, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Gomez.

Petition To Establish Estate'S Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Transfer To Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Continued To Jun-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
